scripts.dev: rm -rf .wrangler && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server && echo y | wrangler d1 migrations apply learntensors-db --local && wrangler d1 execute learntensors-db --local --file=seed.sql && stmux -- [ [ "vite --port 5173" .. "wrangler pages dev --proxy=5173 --compatibility-date=2024-01-01" ] : "sh dev-url.sh" ]
scripts.build: npm run build:ty-wasm && vue-tsc -b && vite build && vite build --ssr src/entry-server.ts --outDir dist/server
